intent: Capture uneven payout timing with bursts of credits and narrow cash cushions between payouts.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should highlight variable income risk and sensitivity to timing gaps even with similar monthly totals.
customerProfileSummary: Gig-income profile with uneven credits and tight mid-cycle liquidity.
whatToLookFor: Rising cash pressure between payouts and higher sensitivity to debit spikes.
realWorldPattern: App-based gig payouts and ad-hoc freelance transfers.
sanitizedNotice: All entities, amounts, and identifiers are fabricated for non-production testing.
